x-kubernetes-validations.message: At least one repository must be configured when backups are enabled
cannot change PGDATA path: config_file, data_directory
cannot change authentication path: hba_file, ident_file
network connectivity is always enabled: listen_addresses
domain socket paths cannot be changed
delayed replication is not supported at this time
cluster_name is derived from the PostgresCluster name
PostgresVersion must be >= 15 if grantPublicSchemaAccess exists and is true
